---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

/* ===== GLOBAL ===== */

body{
  background:#f4f6f5;
  font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  max-width:1050px;
  padding-top:8px !important;
}

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background:#163a2d !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:#f9fafb !important;
  font-weight:500;
  font-size:0.95rem;
  transition:0.2s ease;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#d1fae5 !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background:#1f4d3a;
  color:white;
  padding:80px 60px;
  border-radius:18px;
  margin-bottom:22px;
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3.5rem;
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:760px;
  font-size:1.02rem;
  line-height:1.85;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
  margin:0;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:30px;
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}

.card-box h2{
  font-size:1.12rem;
  font-weight:600;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}

.card-box p,
.card-box li{
  color:#4b5563;
  line-height:1.8;
}

.card-box ul{
  padding-left:20px;
  margin-bottom:0;
}

/* ===== TAGS ===== */

.tag{
  display:inline-block;
  background:#edf2ef;
  color:#163a2d;
  padding:8px 14px;
  border-radius:999px;
  margin:5px 6px 5px 0;
  font-size:0.88rem;
  font-weight:500;
  border:1px solid #dde5e0;
}

/* ===== CV BUTTON ===== */

.cv-button{
  display:inline-block;
  background:#163a2d;
  color:white !important;
  padding:12px 22px;
  border-radius:12px;
  text-decoration:none !important;
  font-weight:500;
  transition:0.2s ease;
  margin-top:10px;
}

.cv-button:hover{
  background:#1f4d3a;
}

/* ===== SECTION ITEMS ===== */

.info-item{
  margin-bottom:22px;
}

.info-item:last-child{
  margin-bottom:0;
}

.info-title{
  font-weight:600;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:6px;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  margin-top:34px;
  text-align:center;
  color:#6b7280;
  font-size:0.9rem;
  padding:12px;
}

.footer strong{
  color:#163a2d;
  font-weight:600;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

About Me

Industrial Engineering Student • Data Analytics Enthusiast • Research-Oriented Thinker

<p> I am passionate about using data-driven insights to optimize processes, support decision-making, and solve complex engineering problems. </p>

:::

::: {.card-box}

Professional Bio

I am Yusuf Bora Çavdar, a third-year Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University, expected to graduate in 2026.

My primary academic interests include:

<ul> <li>Data Science</li> <li>Data Analytics</li> <li>Process Optimization</li> <li>Statistical Analysis</li> <li>Decision Support Systems</li> </ul>

I am particularly interested in the applications of analytics within Human Resources, especially in Training and Development.

Additionally, I have a strong interest in Lean and Six Sigma methodologies.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Areas of Interest

<span class="tag">Data Analytics</span>
<span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="tag">Lean Six Sigma</span>
<span class="tag">Statistical Modeling</span>
<span class="tag">Human Resources Analytics</span>
<span class="tag">Process Improvement</span>

:::

::: {.card-box}

Activities & Personal Development
<div class="info-item"> <div class="info-title">

Financial Literacy Society

</div>

Active member interested in financial management and economic analysis.

</div> <div class="info-item"> <div class="info-title">

Scouting

</div>

Focused on leadership, teamwork, discipline, and outdoor skills through scouting activities.

</div> <div class="info-item"> <div class="info-title">

Language Learning

</div>

Currently learning German to improve international communication and professional opportunities.

</div>

:::

::: {.card-box}

Curriculum Vitae

You can find my detailed academic background, experiences, and achievements in my CV.

<a href="files/cv.pdf" class="cv-button">

Download CV (PDF)

</a>

:::

<div class="footer">

Built with <strong>R</strong> and <strong>Quarto</strong>

</div> ```
